title: Phishing Awareness
short_description: Identify fake links, urgent messages, and phishing tricks.
learning_objective: Students can recognize phishing indicators in emails, SMS, and URLs.

title: Password Security
short_description: Create strong passwords and avoid password reuse.
learning_objective: Students can apply password best practices and understand password managers.

title: Social Engineering
short_description: Understand manipulation tactics used by attackers.
learning_objective: Students can respond safely to impersonation and pressure tactics.

title: Malware & Safe Downloads
short_description: Avoid unsafe downloads, cracked apps, and malicious files.
learning_objective: Students can identify malware risks and safe installation practices.

title: Privacy Protection
short_description: Control app permissions and protect personal data online.
learning_objective: Students can manage privacy settings and reduce oversharing risks.

title: Online Scam Awareness
short_description: Detect suspicious offers, parcel scams, and financial fraud.
learning_objective: Students can evaluate scam indicators before sharing personal details.

title: Mobile Device Security
short_description: Secure smartphones against unsafe apps and fake updates.
learning_objective: Students can apply mobile security practices for Android and iOS.

title: Public Wi-Fi Safety
short_description: Use public Wi-Fi safely and avoid insecure networks.
learning_objective: Students can explain risks of public Wi-Fi and use safer browsing habits.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
short_description: Use MFA/2FA to protect online accounts.
learning_objective: Students can choose safe authentication methods and avoid OTP scams.

title: Data Breach Response
short_description: Know what to do after an account or password leak.
learning_objective: Students can respond to breach alerts and secure affected accounts.

title: Cyberbullying & Digital Ethics
short_description: Practice respectful and safe online communication.
learning_objective: Students can identify harmful online behavior and report it safely.

title: Safe Online Banking
short_description: Protect banking accounts from phishing, fake TAC/OTP requests, and mule scams.
learning_objective: Students can verify banking domains and avoid financial cyber fraud.
